messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The swarm does not push main, so hours of shipped work stay invisible and a live swarm looks dead from outside
What it solves: OBSERVED TWICE IN ONE DAY.
  1. OVERNIGHT: the swarm worked until ~04:00 and accumulated 6 commits on local `main` that never
     reached origin. From outside — GitHub, a remote session, the human's phone — the swarm
     appeared to have died at 04:01. Reconciling it required a manual divergent-b…
How it works: Committed work on main reaches origin without a human

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-356 - The swarm does not push main, so hours of shipped work stay invisible and a live swarm looks dead from outside is complete.
